PATIENT TOOLS

Strain Explorer

Cultivar profiles built for UK patients: published cannabinoid ranges, terpene profiles and reported effects — with honest context on what's actually prescribable here. Filter by what matters to you; product selection always rests with your prescribing clinician.

TYPE
RATIO
EFFECT
MEDICAL USE
FLAVOUR

No strains match — try adjusting your filters.

About this data: Cannabinoid figures are typical published ranges, not batch values — prescribed products carry batch-specific certificates of analysis. Strain availability under these names varies by clinic formulary. This is educational information, not medical advice; product selection is a decision for your prescribing clinician. Last reviewed 11 June 2026.

Medical disclaimer: The Ganja Club is an informational publication, not a medical provider. Nothing on this site constitutes medical advice. Always consult a GMC-registered specialist. Medical cannabis has been legal on prescription in the UK since November 2018.
